scripts.test: npm run build && cd service/dist/agent && cross-env NODE_ENV=development node --test tests/*.test.js ../server/tests/*.test.js ../../../tui/dist/tests/*.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build && cd service/dist/agent && cross-env NODE_ENV=development c8 --all --check-coverage --lines 78 --statements 78 --branches 75 --functions 80 --allow-external --src . --src ../server --src ../../../client/dist/public --src ../../../sims/dist --src ../../../tui/dist --exclude "**/tests/**" --exclude "**/conf/**" --exclude "**/external/**" --exclude "**/ssl/**" --exclude "**/*.d.ts" --reporter=text-summary --reporter=text node --test tests/*.test.js ../server/tests/*.test.js ../../../tui/dist/tests/*.test.js
scripts.dev:server: cd service/dist/server && cross-env NODE_ENV=development NODE_OPTIONS=--enable-source-maps concurrently -n tsc-service,nm-service --kill-others "tsc --build ../../tsconfig.json -w" "nodemon --delay 1.5 app.js"
scripts.dev:agent: cd service/dist/agent && cross-env NODE_ENV=development NODE_OPTIONS="--inspect --enable-source-maps" concurrently -n tsc-agent,nm-agent --kill-others "tsc --build ../../tsconfig.json -w" "nodemon --delay 1.5 app.js"
scripts.loadtest: npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=development node service/dist/loadtest/cli.js
